stories: Good morning Sean, it's Friday, the 10th of April, 2026
Here's a nice one to start your weekend on a high: today marks 114 years since the Titanic set sail from Southampton on her maiden voyage
She departed confident, well-stocked, and ahead of schedule
Less than five days later she was at the bottom of the Atlantic
A timely reminder that even the best-laid plans deserve a good risk register
For your day — looking like a quiet Friday
You've got the Fortnightly GBS Potash OCM Connect at noon on Webex, running until half past twelve, and your lunch slot is blocked from twelve to one
He made clear that Singapore must be ready to operate in contested environments where conventional deterrence alone is not enough
Good morning Sean, it's Tuesday, the 7th of April, 2026
Here's a nice fact to start the day â today is World Health Day, marking the 78th anniversary of the founding of the World Health Organisation
What began in 1948 as a post-war commitment to universal health now coordinates pandemic response and disease control across 194 countries
A worthy institution to have on your side
For your day â the Weekly Planning and Look-Ahead with Bob and Rehan is at ten on Webex
L4 C&D runs from 12:30 to one, and Admin and Any Matter closes out the day at five
In Singapore, cost-of-living relief is coming early
And Parliament tabled a new Bill today on how Singapore and Malaysia will handle incidents on the upcoming JB-Singapore RTS Link
